name: coTfsLssSendFastScanRequest
title: coTfsLssSendFastScanRequest
syntax: long coTfsLssSendFastScanRequest( dword idNumber, dword bitCheck, dword sub, dword next );
description: This function sends a LSS fast scan protocol request.

parameters.name: bitCheck
parameters.description: FastScan bitcheck value, used to define the used bitmask for LSS FastScan.

parameters.name: sub
parameters.description: FastScan sub, defines which part of the LSS-ID is transmitted in idNumber. 0 - vendor-ID1 - product code2 - revision number3 - serial number

parameters.name: next
parameters.description: FastScan next, specifies the sub for the next request.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
